element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Continuous upgrades available; maximum power level has hidden ammo count before reverting to previous level
Limited use; players start with two charges per life, acquire more by collecting B items
Destruction yields score items (currency); contributes to 200,000 point threshold for extra life
First three stages selected randomly from four nation-specific variants; player's character never encounters own nation stage
Final four stages are fixed progression; introduces consistent difficulty escalation
Character ending triggers; game repeats all seven stages in 'much more difficult versions'

typical_relief_triggers: Clearing ground enemies for score items
Stage completion and character ending sequence
typical_tension_triggers: Dense enemy waves in vertical scroll
New Game+ harder difficulty pass after stage 7
Limited special attack charges (starting with only 2 B items)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating wave-based tension with relief provided by collectible drops; second pass through stages significantly increases difficulty to extend play loop

difficulty_curve.early_game: Moderate; introduces weapon upgrades and special attacks through standard shmup mechanics with three starting lives
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increasing challenge as fixed stage sequence begins (stage 4); player must adapt to consistent progression rather than random stage selection
difficulty_curve.late_game: Significant spike; game repeats all seven stages in 'much more difficult versions' after initial completion and character ending
notable_spikes: Transition from random stage selection (stages 1-3) to fixed sequence (stages 4-7)
New Game+ difficulty pass after stage 7 completion

notable_level_patterns.description: First three stages randomly selected from nation-specific variant pool (one per character); character never encounters own nation's stage. Creates replayability variation while maintaining introduction phase.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Stages 1-3 (any random combination from four national variants)

notable_level_patterns.description: Final four stages locked in consistent order; introduces predictable difficulty escalation and eliminates randomization element
After character ending at stage 7, game repeats all seven stages with significantly increased difficulty; extends engagement beyond initial completion
